# Summit Strategy Advisory

> Boutique strategy advisory working alongside founders and leadership teams to create strategy and deliver sustained growth. Three practice areas: AI Product Studio, Loyalty & Retail Media, Scale-Up Advisory.

Summit Strategy Advisory is based in Vancouver, BC, Canada. Founded by Anthony Stevenson — 15+ years across retail technology, market expansion, and product development.

---

## What We Do

### AI Product Studio
We build AI-native technology products for early-stage founders in exchange for equity. No large upfront retainer. First working product live in 4 weeks.

- Equity model: 15–30% typical stake, agreed upfront
- Timeline: Discovery (Week 1) → Spec (Week 2) → Build (Weeks 3–4) → Live
- Best for: Pre-seed or seed-stage founders without a full technical co-founder
- Proof of concept: Podbeat.ai — AI podcast tool built end-to-end by the Summit studio

### Loyalty & Retail Media Advisory
Retained advisory for large retailers covering loyalty programme design, retail media network strategy, and AI-native retail capability.

- Services: Programme diagnostics, retail media network launch, AI quick wins for loyalty teams
- Model: Monthly retainer against defined objectives
- Best for: Large grocery and specialty retailers in North America
- Case results: $40M+ incremental revenue identified (grocery client), $8M retail media opportunity mapped (specialty retailer)

### Scale-Up Advisory
Fractional CXO leadership for growing businesses — senior GTM strategy and execution without the full-time overhead.

- Services: Fractional CRO/CMO, North America expansion playbook, market entry, live deal support
- Model: Monthly retainer, typically 3–12 months
- Best for: B2B companies scaling from $500K–$20M ARR, especially European companies entering North America

---

## Free GTM Tools

Five free AI-powered tools for teams selling into finite, defined markets:

1. ICP Evaluator — https://summitadvisory.com/tools/icp
2. Buyer Persona Quality Check — https://summitadvisory.com/tools/persona
3. Market Problem Validator — https://summitadvisory.com/tools/problem
4. Positioning Statement Grader — https://summitadvisory.com/tools/positioning
5. Competitive Moat Rater — https://summitadvisory.com/tools/moat

All tools are free, no signup required, results in under 60 seconds.

---

## How to Engage

**AI Product Studio:** Submit your idea via the application form at https://summitadvisory.com/ai-studio. We review every submission and respond within 3 business days.

**Loyalty & Retail Media / Scale-Up Advisory:** Book a 30-minute call — no obligation, no pitch deck. https://calendar.google.com/calendar/appointments/schedules/AcZssZ35rKsxptXY-OfUDUjC4G9jWqVTFtPcCPApotrNSNzoQoEvN-HAegmAab4E5jxQ7NAgSF89ollu
